input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.4.9.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.4.9.3
            TITLE: design judging score sheets are available at the fsae online website.

            CONTENT:
            rule S.4.9.3: Design Judging Score Sheets are available at the FSAE Online website.
S.4.9.3 Design Judging Score Sheets are available at the FSAE Online website.

final_answer: Design Judging Score Sheets are available at the FSAE Online website.
